profile.name: Muhammad Bilal Khan
profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer | React & Scalable Systems Specialist
profile.summary: Performance-driven Senior Full-Stack Engineer with over 7.5 years of comprehensive experience engineering resilient web architectures, enterprise integration channels, and native mobile ecosystems. Expert across the full engineering lifecycle—spanning robust enterprise backends (C#/.NET, Golang, Node.js), optimized relational databases (SQL Server, PostgreSQL), and advanced cross-platform frontends (React, React Native, Swift). Proven track record of designing secure, modular systems, automating enterprise workflows (Dynamics 365, Power Platform), and developing specialized sales channel extensions within the Shopify ecosystem. Focused on high-throughput performance, code quality, and driving engineering strategies across complex technical environments.

points: Developed and maintained Shopify sales channel applications for merchant onboarding and product synchronization.
Built and managed Node.js and Go-based backend servers across multiple environments ensuring reliability and performance.
Integrated Microsoft Dynamics 365, SharePoint, Power Platform and Workato for enterprise workflow automation.
Oversaw full-stack lifecycle management from architecture to production monitoring.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and secure solutions.
Led development of scalable React and Node.js applications.
Designed responsive UI using Ant Design and Material-UI (MUI).
Implemented Redux and Context API for centralized state management.
Architected scalable application structures and database schemas.
Mentored developers and conducted code reviews to improve standards.
Collaborated with designers and stakeholders to build interactive UI experiences.
Developed modular React components ensuring scalable and reusable UI architecture.
Built responsive dashboards using Ant Design and Material-UI.
Managed application states using Redux and Context API.
Integrated REST APIs and optimized frontend performance.
Developed SharePoint sites and implemented Power Apps and Power Automate workflows.
Implemented backend testing using Jest to improve reliability.
Collaborated directly with clients to deliver tailored business solutions.
Practiced Android Native Development (Java) and UI implementation principles.

Developed advanced web applications using robust Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+), leveraging a strong understanding of the Document Object Model (DOM) to successfully transition into building scalable components in React and cross-platform mobile apps in React Native.
Engineered native iOS mobile applications utilizing Swift, implementing smooth user interfaces and integrating clean backend API functionalities.

experiences.role: Intermediate Software Developer / Software Development Intern
points: Designed, developed, and maintained robust, scalable enterprise web applications and RESTful APIs using C#, .NET Core / .NET Framework, and MVC architecture, improving database response times by 25%.
Authored complex SQL queries, stored procedures, indexes, and views in SQL Server, ensuring data integrity while optimizing long-running transactional scripts to prevent server deadlocks.
Implemented advanced asynchronous programming (async/await) and generic repositories using LINQ and Entity Framework Core to manage data transfer layers efficiently.
Developed and engineered background worker services and Windows Forms/WPF applications utilizing modern C# multi-threading protocols to automate manual client workflows and data processing.
